title: Allowlist revocation → existing tenant blocked
evidence: All 8 TC-027 tests passed in 1640ms (413/413 total suite): - DELETE /v1/admin/allowlist/:id returns {revoked: true} ✓ - allowlist.revoked_at set in DB ✓ - ACCESS_REVOKED audit event written (actor=admin, tenant_id=null, metadata with slack_team_id/slack_user_id) ✓ - POST /v1/tenants/:id/message returns 403 {ok: false, error: 'Access revoked'} for revoked tenant ✓ - No MESSAGE_DELIVERED event written for blocked message ✓
